**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Runbang Intelligent Garage Co., Ltd. presents a clear case of industry misclassification within official registries. While cataloged under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing', its actual physical and operational footprint firmly establishes it as a heavy-steel fabricator and construction engineering firm specializing in automated parking systems. Operating out of the Xingdian Industrial Concentration Zone with a substantial workforce of 66 insured employees and a massive paid-in capital of 88 million RMB, the company is fully equipped for physical manufacturing. Its core business revolves around the design, non-standard processing, and installation of multi-level stereo parking garages. The recent addition of 'earthwork engineering construction' to its permitted scope indicates a strategic expansion into full-cycle turnkey project delivery, handling everything from ground excavation to final structural assembly.
